3145630.name: EDICT
3145630.description:
EDICT is ther first chapter in a single player first person horror experience that is rich in story with about an hour of play time.

Explore a cursed land, uncover clues, collect supplies to help you survive, solve puzzles, and encounter a range of terrifying monsters that will force you to run, hide and eventually, fight back.

Story:

At the end of WW2, the last stronghold on the losing side, besieged by enemies, mysteriously vanished in an unexplained phenomena moments before being overrun. There were no surviving witnesses on either side to explain what happened & no contact has been made with the surrounding town since.

Now, in the year 1981, plagued by nightmares, tragedy and mental illness, our protagonist finds himself pulled into the heart of the missing town.  You'll encounter what remains of the town's inhabitants, uncover the terrifying secrets of what happened in the moments before the castle disappeared, and confront the malignant force that took it's place.

Gameplay Features:

  • Over An Hour of Play Time each Play through

  • High Quality Graphics

  • Rich Story

  • Terrifying Jump Scares

  • Ambient Horror & Tension Building

  • Weapon Based Combat

  • Puzzle Solving

  • Inventory & Journal
3145630.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
